name: Grand Marnier Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg yolks and sugar until well combined.
2. Gradually fold in the beaten heavy cream until smooth.
3. Stir in the Grand Marnier and pour the mixture into small ramekins or dessert glasses.
4. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to set.
5. Serve with a dollop of whipped cream and chocolate shavings.
6. Berry Sauce: Drain excess liquid from thawed frozen berries after defrosting. Puree in a blender until smooth. Add Grand Marnier to taste. Serve the berry sauce alongside the mousse.
Submitted to Recipelu by Chelle Gardner. Chelle51@aol.com
